title: Opentrons COVID-19 Testing Protocol for 48 Samples
author: Max Marrone
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bestjeen

steps.title: Clean the OT-2
steps.instruction: Clean the OT-2. Cleaning an OT-2 COVID-19 Diagnostic Station by Max Marrone

steps.title: An Opentrons Temperature Module with an...
steps.instruction: An Opentrons Temperature Module with an Opentrons 96 well aluminum block and an empty, sterile NEST 100 µL PCR plate. Slots 3, 6, 7, 9, and

steps.title: A full, sterile rack of Opentrons 200 µL filter tips
steps.instruction: A full, sterile rack of Opentrons 200 µL filter tips. Slot

steps.title: An Opentrons Magnetic Module with nothing on it
steps.instruction: An Opentrons Magnetic Module with nothing on it. Slot

steps.title: An empty NEST 1-well reservoir, for organic liquid waste
steps.instruction: An empty NEST 1-well reservoir, for organic liquid waste.

steps.title: Start pre-cooling the Temperature Module to 6 °C
steps.instruction: Start pre-cooling the Temperature Module to 6 °C .

steps.title: Wait for the Temperature Module to reach Undetermined
steps.instruction: Wait for the Temperature Module to reach Undetermined .

steps.title: Place the sample well plate in slot 4
steps.instruction: Place the sample well plate in slot 4 .

steps.title: Place the reagent reservoir in slot 2
steps.instruction: Place the reagent reservoir in slot 2.

steps.title: Double-check all the labware to make sure it looks correct
steps.instruction: Double-check all the labware to make sure it looks correct. Check that labware are inserted the right way around (well A1 at the top-left for the plates, well 1 at the left for the troughs). Check that labware are properly clicked into the deck slots. Check the deck layout:

steps.title: Run the Station B protocol on the OT-2
steps.instruction: Run the Station B protocol on the OT-2. The protocol file should be StationB-48samples-Zymo.py. Operating an OT-2 for COVID-19 testing by Max Marrone

steps.title: The output is the NEST 100...
steps.instruction: The output is the NEST 100 µL PCR plate sitting on the aluminum block atop the Temperature Module in slot 1.

steps.title: Vortex the Viral DNA/RNA Buffer +...
steps.instruction: Vortex the Viral DNA/RNA Buffer + MagBinding Beads immediately before adding them to the reservoir. Into a 15 mL NEST 12 well reservoir, pipette or pour the following reagents: Well
14.35 mL, Viral DNA/RNA Buffer + MagBinding Beads Well
14.35 mL, Viral DNA/RNA Buffer + MagBinding Beads Well
14.35 mL, Viral DNA/RNA Buffer + MagBinding Beads Well

steps.title: 5 mL, nuclease-free water A 15...
steps.instruction: 5 mL, nuclease-free water A 15 mL NEST 12 well reservoir.

steps.title: Prepare 3x 14
steps.instruction: Prepare 3x 14.35 mL, Viral DNA/RNA Buffer + MagBinding Beads ...

steps.title: In a sterile 15 mL tube,...
steps.instruction: In a sterile 15 mL tube, add 14 mL, Viral DNA/RNA Buffer .

steps.title: Vortex the MagBinding Beads in their container
steps.instruction: Vortex the MagBinding Beads in their container.

steps.title: Pipe 0
steps.instruction: Pipe 0.35 mL, vortexed MagBinding Beads to the 15 mL tube.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of 3x 14
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of 3x 14.35 mL, Viral DNA/RNA Buffer + MagBinding Beads .

steps.title: Prepare the sample well plate
steps.instruction: Prepare the sample well plate. The sample well plate is a NEST 96 deep well plate. The 48 samples (#1–#48) should be laid out like this: %s %s For each sample well...

steps.title: Add 4 µL, Proteinase K
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL, Proteinase K .

steps.title: Add 400 µL, sample
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL, sample .

steps.title: Mix
steps.instruction: Mix.

steps.title: Wait for the run to finish
steps.instruction: Wait for the run to finish. It should take 2.5–3 hours.
